calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR First Account Of Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Genevieve Larson for Robert Kahan and Hamilton Loeb (Petitioners). Melissa Pugash in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to legal fees. The First Account of Trustees was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR First Account Of Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First And Final Account And Report Of Co-Trustees And Petition For Settlement, Approval Of Modification Of Irrevocable Trust, Ect.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Caspersen for Trustees. Melisssa Joy Pugash (Beneficiary) in Pro Per.

Ms. Pugash has consented to transfer of the Trust to Mechanics Bank but she wants to see an accounting of last year's legal fees. The Court approved the modification of the Trust, accepted resignations of the Co-Trustees and appointing Mechanics Bank as the new Trustee (subject to receipt/review of order). Mr. Caspersen will submit a declaration with regard to the attorney's fees for the last five years. The First and Final Account was continued to March 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

First And Final Account And Report Of Co-Trustees And Petition For Settlement, Approval Of Modification Of Irrevocable Trust, Ect.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Continued To Feb-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
